column1: Question: How can I place an order?
Answer: You can place an order through our website or mobile app by adding products to your cart and completing the checkout process.
Question: Do I need an account to place an order?
Answer: No, guest checkout is available, but creating an account helps you track orders easily.
Question: Can I modify my order after placing it?
Answer: Yes, modifications are possible before the order is shipped.
Question: How do I know if my order was successful?
Answer: You will receive an order confirmation email or SMS.
Question: What payment methods are accepted?
Answer: We accept credit cards, debit cards, UPI, net banking, and digital wallets.
Question: Can I cancel my order?
Answer: Yes, orders can usually be canceled before shipment.
Question: Why was my order canceled automatically?
Answer: Orders may be canceled due to payment failure, stock issues, or incorrect information.
Question: How can I check my order status?
Answer: Log into your account and visit the “My Orders” section.
Question: What should I do if I entered the wrong address?
Answer: Contact customer support immediately before the order is dispatched.
Question: Can I place bulk orders?
Answer: Yes, bulk orders are accepted depending on product availability.
Question: Will I receive an invoice for my order?
Answer: Yes, an invoice will be emailed to you after purchase.
Question: Can I reorder a previous purchase?
Answer: Yes, you can reorder from your order history.
Question: What happens if an item is out of stock?
Answer: You may receive a notification or refund for unavailable items.
Question: Can I change the quantity of items in my order?
Answer: Yes, before the order is processed.
Question: How long does order processing take?
Answer: Processing usually takes 1–2 business days.
Question: Do prices include taxes?
Answer: Yes, taxes are generally included unless stated otherwise.
Question: Can I apply multiple discount codes?
Answer: Usually only one discount code can be applied per order.
Question: What if I don’t receive my order confirmation email?
Answer: Check your spam folder or contact support.
Question: Can I order internationally?
Answer: Yes, international shipping may be available for selected locations.
Question: What should I do if my payment failed?
Answer: Retry the payment or use another payment method.
Question: What shipping methods are available?
Answer: Standard, express, and same-day delivery options may be available.
Question: How much does shipping cost?
Answer: Shipping costs depend on location, weight, and delivery method.
Question: Do you offer free shipping?
Answer: Yes, free shipping may apply on eligible orders.
Question: How long does shipping take?
Answer: Delivery times vary depending on location and shipping method.
Question: Can I track my shipment?
Answer: Yes, tracking details will be shared after dispatch.
Question: What courier partners do you use?
Answer: We work with trusted courier companies for safe delivery.
Question: Do you ship on weekends?
Answer: Shipping schedules depend on courier services and location.
Question: What if my package is delayed?
Answer:  Contact support if your package exceeds the estimated delivery time.
Question: Can I change my shipping address after dispatch?
Answer: Address changes may not be possible after shipment.
Question: Do you deliver to remote locations?
Answer:  Yes, but delivery may take longer.
Question: What is express shipping?
Answer: Express shipping is a faster delivery option with additional charges.
Question: How will I know when my order ships?
Answer:  You will receive a shipping confirmation email or SMS.
Question: What happens if I miss my delivery?
Answer:  The courier may attempt redelivery or contact you.
Question: Can someone else receive my package?
Answer: Yes, anyone at the delivery address can usually receive it.
Question: Do you ship internationally?
Answer: Yes, international shipping is available in selected countries.
Question: Will I have to pay customs charges?
Answer: Customs duties depend on your country’s regulations.
Question: Can I schedule a delivery date?
Answer: Scheduled delivery may be available in certain areas.
Question: What packaging do you use?
Answer:  Products are securely packed to avoid damage during transit.
Question: Do you provide eco-friendly packaging?
Answer: Yes, eco-friendly packaging options may be available.
Question: Can I combine multiple orders into one shipment?
Answer: This may be possible before dispatch.
Question: What are your delivery hours?
Answer: Deliveries are usually made during standard business hours.
Question: How do I track my delivery driver?
Answer: Some courier partners provide live tracking services.
Question: What if my package arrives damaged?
Answer: Report the issue immediately with photos of the package.
Question: What if an item is missing from my package?
Answer: Contact support with your order details.
Question: What should I do if I received the wrong product?
Answer: Request a replacement or return through customer support.
Question: Can I refuse delivery?
Answer: Yes, you may refuse delivery if the package is damaged or incorrect.
Question: What happens to undelivered packages?
Answer: Packages are usually returned to the warehouse.
Question: Do you require a signature on delivery?
Answer: Some orders may require a signature for security.
Question: Can I pick up my order instead of delivery?
Answer: Store pickup may be available in selected locations.
Question: How do I know my package was delivered?
Answer: You will receive a delivery confirmation notification.
Question: Can deliveries be made to offices?
Answer: Yes, deliveries can be made to office addresses.
Question: Do you offer contactless delivery?
Answer: Yes, contactless delivery options may be available.
Question: What if my tracking information is not updating?
Answer: Tracking updates may take 24–48 hours.
Question: Can I request special delivery instructions?
Answer: Yes, you can add instructions during checkout.
Question: What if my package is marked delivered but not received?
Answer: Check with neighbors or contact the courier and support team.
Question: Do you deliver during holidays?
Answer: Holiday deliveries depend on courier operations.
Question: How secure is the shipping process?
Answer: Orders are packed and shipped securely to minimize risks.
Question: What if my address is difficult to locate?
Answer: Provide landmarks or detailed directions while ordering.
Question: Can I track international shipments?
Answer: Yes, international orders usually include tracking.
Question: What happens if my package is lost?
Answer: A replacement or refund may be issued after investigation.
Question: What is your return policy?
Answer: Returns are accepted within the specified return period.
Question: How do I initiate a return?
Answer: Log into your account or contact support to request a return.
Question: Are return shipping charges free?
Answer: Free returns may apply for eligible products.
Question: How long does it take to process a refund?
Answer: Refunds are usually processed within 5–10 business days.
Question: Can I exchange a product instead of returning it?
Answer: Yes, exchanges are available for selected products.
Question: What items cannot be returned?
Answer: Personalized, perishable, or hygiene products may not be returnable.
Question: What if I received a defective item?
Answer: You can request a replacement or refund.
Question: Will I get a full refund?
Answer: Refund eligibility depends on the product condition and policy.
Question: How will I receive my refund?
Answer: Refunds are sent to the original payment method.
Question: Can I return international orders?
Answer: Return policies for international orders may vary.
Question: Do I need the original packaging for returns?
Answer: Yes, original packaging is recommended.
Question: Can I cancel a return request?
Answer: Yes, before the return is processed.
Question: How do I know my return was received?
Answer: You will receive a confirmation notification.
Question: Can I return part of my order?
Answer: Yes, individual items can often be returned separately.
Question: What if my refund is delayed?
Answer: Contact support if the refund exceeds the expected timeline.
Question: Can gift items be returned?
Answer: Yes, depending on the return policy.
Question: What is a restocking fee?
Answer: Some returns may include a small restocking charge.
Question: Can I exchange for a different size or color?
Answer: Yes, subject to product availability.
Question: Do you offer instant refunds?
Answer: Instant refunds may be available for selected payment methods.
Question: What if my return request is rejected?
Answer: You will receive an explanation from the support team.
Question: How can I contact customer support?
Answer: You can contact us via email, phone, or live chat.
Question: What are customer support hours?
Answer: Support hours vary depending on region and service availability.
Question: Do you provide order updates through SMS?
Answer: Yes, SMS notifications may be available.
Question: Can I save multiple shipping addresses?
Answer: Yes, registered users can save multiple addresses.
Question: How can I apply a promo code?
Answer: Enter the code during checkout in the promo code field.
Question: Can I use store credit for purchases?
Answer: Yes, store credit can usually be applied at checkout.
Question: Do you offer gift wrapping?
Answer: Gift wrapping may be available for selected products.
Question: Can I include a gift message with my order?
Answer: Yes, gift messages can be added during checkout.
Question: How secure is my payment information?
Answer: Payments are processed through secure encrypted systems.
Question: Can I receive notifications about sales and offers?
Answer: Yes, subscribe to newsletters or notifications.
Question: Do you have a loyalty or rewards program?
Answer: Yes, eligible customers may earn rewards points.
Question: Can I use multiple payment methods for one order?
Answer: This depends on the payment options available.
Question: What if I accidentally placed duplicate orders?
Answer: Contact support immediately for assistance.
Question: Can I request invoices with GST details?
Answer: Yes, GST invoices are available where applicable.
Question: What happens if the product price changes after my purchase?
Answer: The charged price remains the same after order confirmation.
Question: Can I pre-order upcoming products?
Answer: Yes, pre-orders may be available for selected items.
Question: How can I unsubscribe from promotional emails?
Answer: Use the unsubscribe link in the email.
Question: Do you offer same-day delivery?
Answer: Same-day delivery may be available in selected cities.
Question: Can I chat with customer support online?
Answer: Yes, live chat support may be available on the website.
Question: Where can I find your shipping and return policies?
Answer: Yes, live chat support may be available on the website.
